lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਲਾ ਗੋਲਾ ਧਣੀ ਕੋ ਕਿਆ ਕਹਉ ਵਡਿਆਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: laalaa golaa dhanee ko kiaa khau vaddiaaeeai |
lines.english: I am the servant and slave of my Master; what glorious greatness of His can I describe?

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪੂਰੇ ਸਾਬਾਸਿ ਹੈ ਕਾਟੈ ਮਨ ਪੀਰਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: gur poore saabaas hai kaattai man peeraa |2|
lines.english: The Perfect Guru is honored and celebrated; He has taken away the pains of my mind. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਛੁੜਿਆ ਕਉ ਮੇਲਿ ਲਏ ਗੁਰ ਕਉ ਬਲਿ ਜਾਈਐ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: vichhurriaa kau mel le gur kau bal jaaeeai |3|
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to my Guru, who re-unites the separated ones. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਣੈ ਬਖਸੇ ਪੂਰਾ ਧਣੀ ਸਚੁ ਕਾਰ ਕਮਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: bhaanai bakhase pooraa dhanee sach kaar kamaaeeai |
lines.english: The Perfect Master, by the Pleasure of His Will, forgives, and then one practices Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਤੇਰਾ ਤੂ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਸਚੁ ਧੀਰਕ ਧੁਰ ਕੀ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: man tan teraa too prabhoo sach dheerak dhur kee |4|
lines.english: My mind and body belong to You, God; from the very beginning, Truth has been my only support. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਲੇ ਗੋਲੇ ਮਤਿ ਖਰੀ ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਮਤਿ ਨੀਕੀ ॥
lines.translit: laale gole mat kharee gur kee mat neekee |
lines.english: The intellect of His servant and slave is noble and true; it is made so by the Guru's intellect.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚੀ ਸੁਰਤਿ ਸੁਹਾਵਣੀ ਮਨਮੁਖ ਮਤਿ ਫੀਕੀ ॥
lines.translit: saachee surat suhaavanee manamukh mat feekee |
lines.english: The intuition of those who are true is beautiful; the intellect of the self-willed manmukh is insipid.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਿਤਿ ਸਚੈ ਵਿਤੋ ਸਚਾ ਸਾਚਾ ਰਸੁ ਚਾਖਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: chit sachai vito sachaa saachaa ras chaakhiaa |
lines.english: With Truth in my consciousness, I gather the wealth of Truth, and drink in the sublime essence of Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚੈ ਬੈਸਣੁ ਉਠਣਾ ਸਚੁ ਭੋਜਨੁ ਭਾਖਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: saachai baisan utthanaa sach bhojan bhaakhiaa |
lines.english: In Truth I sit and stand; I eat and speak the Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚੈ ਘਰਿ ਸਾਚੈ ਰਖੇ ਗੁਰ ਬਚਨਿ ਸੁਭਾਖਿਆ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: saachai ghar saachai rakhe gur bachan subhaakhiaa |5|
lines.english: In the home of Truth, the True Lord protects me; I speak the Words of the Guru's Teachings with love. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਕਉ ਆਲਸੁ ਘਣੋ ਫਾਥੇ ਓਜਾੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh kau aalas ghano faathe ojaarree |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukh is very lazy; he is trapped in the wilderness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਮੁਕਤੁ ਹੋਇ ਸਾਚੇ ਨਿਜ ਤਾੜੀ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee mukat hoe saache nij taarree |6|
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, one is liberated, absorbed in the primal trance of Truth. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਫਾਥਾ ਚੁਗੈ ਨਿਤ ਚੋਗੜੀ ਲਗਿ ਬੰਧੁ ਵਿਗਾੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: faathaa chugai nit chogarree lag bandh vigaarree |
lines.english: He is drawn to the bait, and continually pecking at it, he is trapped; his link to the Lord is ruined.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਹਤਿ ਲਾਲਾ ਬੇਧਿਆ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਹੇਤਿ ਪਿਆਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: anahat laalaa bedhiaa prabh het piaaree |
lines.english: His slave remains continually pierced through with love and affection for God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਾਚੇ ਜੀਉ ਜਲਿ ਬਲਉ ਝੂਠੇ ਵੇਕਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: bin saache jeeo jal blau jhootthe vekaaree |
lines.english: Without the True Lord, the soul of the false, corrupt person is burnt to ashes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਦਿ ਕਾਰਾ ਸਭਿ ਛੋਡੀਆ ਸਾਚੀ ਤਰੁ ਤਾਰੀ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: baad kaaraa sabh chhoddeea saachee tar taaree |7|
lines.english: Abandoning all evil actions, he crosses over in the boat of Truth. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਿਸਾਰਿਆ ਤਿਨਾ ਠਉਰ ਨ ਠਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jinee naam visaariaa tinaa tthaur na tthaau |
lines.english: Those who have forgotten the Naam have no home, no place of rest.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਲੈ ਲਾਲਚੁ ਤਿਆਗਿਆ ਪਾਇਆ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: laalai laalach tiaagiaa paaeaa har naau |
lines.english: The Lord's slave renounces greed and attachment, and obtains the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰੂ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: maaroo mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Maaroo, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਲੈ ਗਾਰਬੁ ਛੋਡਿਆ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਭੈ ਸਹਜਿ ਸੁਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: laalai gaarab chhoddiaa gur kai bhai sehaj subhaaee |
lines.english: The Lord's slave renounces his egotistical pride, through the Guru's Fear, intuitively and easily.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਬਖਸਹਿ ਤਾ ਮੇਲਿ ਲੈਹਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਬਲਿ ਜਾਉ ॥੮॥੪॥
lines.translit: too bakhaseh taa mel laihi naanak bal jaau |8|4|
lines.english: If You forgive him, Lord, then He is united with You; Nanak is a sacrifice. ||8||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਲੈ ਖਸਮੁ ਪਛਾਣਿਆ ਵਡੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: laalai khasam pachhaaniaa vaddee vaddiaaee |
lines.english: The slave realizes his Lord and Master; glorious is his greatness!

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਸਮਿ ਮਿਲਿਐ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਕਹਣੁ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: khasam miliai sukh paaeaa keemat kehan na jaaee |1|
lines.english: Meeting with his Lord and Master, he finds peace; His value cannot be desribed. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਉਬਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਸਰਣਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee ubare har kee saranaaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, I am saved, in the Sanctuary of the Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਲਾ ਗੋਲਾ ਖਸਮ ਕਾ ਖਸਮੈ ਵਡਿਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: laalaa golaa khasam kaa khasamai vaddiaaee |
lines.english: I am the slave and servant of my Lord and Master; all glory is to my Master.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਲੈ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਪਛਾਣਿਆ ਸਦਾ ਰਹੈ ਰਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: laalai hukam pachhaaniaa sadaa rahai rajaaee |
lines.english: The slave realizes the Hukam of His Command, and submits to His Will forever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਲੇ ਨੋ ਸਿਰਿ ਕਾਰ ਹੈ ਧੁਰਿ ਖਸਮਿ ਫੁਰਮਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: laale no sir kaar hai dhur khasam furamaaee |
lines.english: The slave has been given the most excellent task, by the Primal Command of the Master.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਮੀਰਾ ਬਖਸਿ ਲਏ ਵਡੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: aape meeraa bakhas le vaddee vaddiaaee |2|
lines.english: The Lord King Himself grants forgiveness; how glorious is His greatness! ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਸਚਾ ਸਭੁ ਸਚੁ ਹੈ ਗੁਰ ਸਬਦਿ ਬੁਝਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: aap sachaa sabh sach hai gur sabad bujhaaee |
lines.english: He Himself is True, and everything is True; this is revealed through the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰੀ ਸੇਵਾ ਸੋ ਕਰੇ ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਲੈਹਿ ਤੂ ਲਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: teree sevaa so kare jis no laihi too laaee |
lines.english: He alone serves You, whom You have enjoined to do so.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸੇਵਾ ਕਿਨੈ ਨ ਪਾਇਆ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਰਮਿ ਖੁਆਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: bin sevaa kinai na paaeaa doojai bharam khuaaee |3|
lines.english: Without serving Him, no one finds Him; in duality and doubt, they are ruined. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਉ ਪਿੰਡੁ ਸਭੁ ਤਿਸ ਦਾ ਸਾਹੁ ਤਿਨੈ ਵਿਚਿ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jeeo pindd sabh tis daa saahu tinai vich paaeaa |
lines.english: Soul and body, all belong to Him; He infused the breath into us.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਕਿਉ ਮਨਹੁ ਵਿਸਾਰੀਐ ਨਿਤ ਦੇਵੈ ਚੜੈ ਸਵਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: so kiau manahu visaareeai nit devai charrai savaaeaa |
lines.english: How could we forget Him from our minds? The gifts which he bestows increase day by day.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਰੇ ਤਾ ਸੇਵੀਐ ਸੇਵਿ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਇਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: jaa kripaa kare taa seveeai sev sach samaaeaa |4|
lines.english: If he shows His Mercy, then we serve Him; serving Him, we merge in Truth. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਲਾ ਸੋ ਜੀਵਤੁ ਮਰੈ ਮਰਿ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: laalaa so jeevat marai mar vichahu aap gavaae |
lines.english: He alone is the Lord's slave, who remains dead while yet alive, and eradicates egotism from within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਮਹਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਹੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਕੋ ਪਾਏ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: sabh meh naam nidhaan hai guramukh ko paae |5|
lines.english: The treasure of the Naam, the Name of the Lord, is within all, but how rare are those who, as Gurmukh, obtain it. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੰਧਨ ਤੂਟਹਿ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਹੋਇ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਅਗਨਿ ਬੁਝਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: bandhan tootteh mukat hoe trisanaa agan bujhaae |
lines.english: His bonds are broken, the fire of his desire is quenched, and he is liberated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਧੁ ਜੇਵਡੁ ਦਾਤਾ ਕੋ ਨਹੀ ਤੂ ਬਖਸਣਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: tudh jevadd daataa ko nahee too bakhasanahaar |
lines.english: There is no Giver as great as You, Lord; You alone are the Forgiver.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਲੇ ਵਿਚਿ ਗੁਣੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਨਹੀ ਲਾਲਾ ਅਵਗਣਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: laale vich gun kichh nahee laalaa avaganiaar |
lines.english: Within the Lord's slave, there is no virtue at all; the Lord's slave is totally unworthy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰਾ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਲਾਲਾ ਮੰਨੇ ਏਹ ਕਰਣੀ ਸਾਰੁ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: teraa hukam laalaa mane eeh karanee saar |6|
lines.english: Your slave obeys the Hukam of Your Command; this is the most excellent action. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਪਦਾਰਥੁ ਅਮਰੁ ਹੈ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: naam padaarath amar hai hiradai man vasaae |
lines.english: The treasure of the Naam brings immortality; enshrine it in your heart and mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਸਾਗਰੁ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਸਰੁ ਜੋ ਇਛੇ ਸੋ ਫਲੁ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: gur saagar amrit sar jo ichhe so fal paae |
lines.english: The Guru is the pool of nectar in the world-ocean; whatever one desires, that fruit is obtained.
